text.title: Product-Led Growth (PLG) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml. Every branch uses an observable (input field name + operator + value). Every leaf references a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: All `## Applies If` items hold AND no `## Skip If` item fires?

conclusion.verdict: skip this methodology; log skip reason

branch.question: Named owner present for the produced artefact?
All required inputs (per `## Prerequisites`) available AND ≤7 days old where applicable?

conclusion.verdict: defer cycle; surface input gap to upstream owner

branch.question: Prior-cycle artefact exists AND is consumable?

conclusion.verdict: run end-to-end; compare deltas against prior artefact
run end-to-end as first cycle; establish baseline

text.example: preconditions_satisfied=true → owner=ruslan → inputs_fresh=true → prior_cycle_artefact=present → conclusion ref="aha-moment-under-five-minutes".
